title: The Leopard Lady
writer: Beulah Marie Dix, Edward Childs Carpenter
actors: Jacqueline Logan, Alan Hale, Robert Armstrong
plot: Paula (Jacqueline Logan), a leopard trainer known as the Leopard Lady, is hired by police to join a circus and investigate a series of thefts and murders. She discovers that Caesar (Alan Hale), a Cossack, owns an ape trained by hi...
